name: Neal Sheorey
background: Mr. Sheorey has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since November 2023. Prior to joining Albemarle, he served as Vice President, Finance for Dow Inc.'s Coatings & Performance Monomers and Plastic Additives businesses.

company_affiliations.name: Albemarle Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

company_affiliations.name: Dow Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various leadership roles, including Vice President of Investor Relations, Senior Director of Corporate Development, and Global Finance Director for the Chemicals business group.
